<!-- Please fill in every section. Issues missing the bridge command line or a
     debug-log excerpt are much harder to triage. -->

## What happened

A clear description of the problem and what you expected instead.

## Bridge command line (required)

The exact command you launched the bridge with, e.g.:

```
./bin/star_bridge /path/to/ds4-agent /path/to/workspace -p 9033 --framed
```

## `.codex-bridge-debug.log` excerpt (required)

Paste the relevant lines from `.codex-bridge-debug.log` in your working directory
(scrub any tokens or private paths first):

```
<paste excerpt here>
```

## Versions (required)

- Star Bridge: <output of `./bin/star_bridge --version`>
- Codex desktop app version:
- ds4 / ds4-agent version:
- OS + arch (e.g. macOS 14 arm64):
